function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written because only one of the two referenced projects has a canonical project record. I found Petra’s parts library project, but there is no BlueMesa Quotebook project in 40_projects, so I cannot compare two start dates or determine which one to delete without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow: treated inbox as request, verified against canonical project lane, and avoided mutation when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because the task requires two canonical project start dates, but only one project record was found. Read 40_projects/2026_04_27_studio_parts_library/README.MD for Petra’s parts library; search of 40_projects for BlueMesa/Quotebook returned 0 matches, so completing deletion would require guesswork.
